item.name: Namingway
item.description:
Do not think this means you can now change your character's name.

Use item to acquire the Namingway minion.
item.tooltip:
I do not expect all moogles
to be well versed in
Roegadyn naming conventions.
   - Klynthota
item.specialactiondescription: Removes all detrimental effects from all allies within range.
